name: GetLeads
description: Fetch a list of active leads from the CRM, with optional status and program name filters.

status.description: Filter leads by their current status (e.g. New, Contacted, Qualified, Lost)

program.description: Filter leads interested in a specific program name (e.g. Full Stack, Data Science)

name: GetCustomers
description: Fetch a list of active customers with subscription summaries.

limit.description: Maximum number of customers to return

name: GetTasks
description: Query follow-up tasks by counselor assignment and completion status.

onlyOverdue.description: If true, returns only overdue follow-ups

name: CreateTask
description: Create a new CRM follow-up task assigned to a specific counselor.

title.description: Brief description of the task objective

dueDate.description: Target completion date in YYYY-MM-DD format

name: GetDashboardSummary
description: Compile CRM statistics for visitors, revenue, leads, and overdue tasks.

name: GetNotifications
description: Fetch unread system and CRM event alert notifications.

onlyUnread.description: If true, filters out read notifications

name: GetWorkflowStatus
description: Get execution history and status logs for lead workflow triggers.

workflowId.description: Unique identifier of the workflow rule
